'''âzh-th-m-sh''' ('''kazhathmeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jeopardize|jeopardize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-m-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jeopardize|jeopardize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-th-m-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kazhathmeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhathmeshoko|thizhathmeshoko]] || [[word:jizhathmeshoko|jizhathmeshoko]] || [[word:shizhathmeshoko|shizhathmeshoko]] || [[word:kizhathmeshoko|kizhathmeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhathmeshoko|thozhathmeshoko]] || [[word:jozhathmeshoko|jozhathmeshoko]] || [[word:shozhathmeshoko|shozhathmeshoko]] || [[word:kozhathmeshoko|kozhathmeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhathmeshoko|thĂŠzhathmeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzhathmeshoko|jĂŠzhathmeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzhathmeshoko|shĂŠzhathmeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzhathmeshoko|kĂŠzhathmeshoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
